title: Day 40 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - あの　しんごうを　みぎへ　まがって、　まっすぐ　いくと、はしが　あります。= At that light you turn right and if you go straight there is a bridge.

Sentence 2 - その　はしを　わたると、　ひだりに　ありますよ。= After crossing the bridge, it is on the left.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
